title: pentacalia inornata
intro: Pentacalia inornata is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Colombia and Ecuador, and is also known as the 'white pentacalia'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pentacalia inornata include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Pentacalia inornata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
